Junior Support Engineer : Bright Technologies Limited ( BTL ) Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List Bright Technologies Limited ( BTL ) Junior Support Engineer Application Deadline : 22 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 8 Location: Dhaka Salary: Tk. 12000 - 15000 (Monthly) Published: 12 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Experience Additional Requirements Only Male Responsibilities & Context Career Progression First 3 Months: Physical Support Engineer (Field Support) After 3 Months: Call Center Support Engineer Future Opportunity: Promotion to NOC (Network Operations Center) Engineer based on performance. Responsibilities: Home User Support Install new broadband connections at home user premises. Configure Dial-Up / PPPoE username and password for customers. Set up WiFi routers and home network devices. Troubleshoot internet connectivity issues at customer homes. Check and repair LAN cables, fiber lines, and connectors. Resolve issues like slow internet speed, frequent disconnection, or no connection. Guide customers on WiFi usage, password change, and router reset. Replace faulty routers, adapters, or network cables. Perform signal testing and internet speed testing after installation. Provide basic remote support over phone or messaging if needed. Skills & Expertise Communication Internet ISP related work Service and Support Suggested by Information technology IT Support Service IT Support Service and Network engineering. Compensation & Other Benefits Mobile bill Employment Status Full Time Gender Only males are allowed to apply. Job Location Dhaka Company Information Bright Technologies Limited ( BTL ) Follow Address: Flat : D7,House : 418 , Kuwati Mosque Road , Vatara, Dhaka, Bangladesh Website: https://btlbd.net/ Business: Bright Technologies Limited (BTL) is a One Stop IT solution company with Its services ranging from connectivity, Solution and Power. The company is running Its operation through innovation, respect, accountability, reliability and many more. It started its journey with these 3 (three) Strategic Business Units. Its connectivity wing ensures the Internet and Data connectivity across the country, targeting the enterprise segment over confirming 99.99% up time backed by round the clock call center along with highly specialized support and solution technical team. job_description: Admission Executive (Europe) : KOMPASS Jobs ENG বাংলা Create Account Sign In For Employer Create Sign In Home Jobs Mybdjobs Job List KOMPASS Admission Executive (Europe) Application Deadline : 20 Mar 2026 Apply Now Shortlist Share: Facebook LinkedIn WhatsApp All Requirements Responsibilities Skills & Expertise Salary & Benefits Company Information Summary Vacancy: 5 Age: 20 to 35 years Location: Dhaka (Ramna, Siddheswari... Dhaka (Ramna, Siddheswari) Salary: Negotiable Experience: At least 1 year Published: 12 Mar 2026 Applicants are encouraged to submit Video CV. Application Insights View Requirements Education Bachelor/Honors Experience At least 1 year The applicants should have experience in the following business area(s): Immigration and Education Consultancy Service, Immigration/Visa Processing, Educational Technology (Edtech) Startup Freshers are also encouraged to apply. Additional Requirements Age 20 to 35 years Punctuality: Arrive on time and adhere to work schedules. Sincerity: Approach all tasks with sincerity and a commitment to student success. Minimum 1 year of experience in admission and/or visa processing for European countries Excellent written and spoken communication skills in English and Bengali Ability to handle multiple student files efficiently Organized, detail-oriented, and student-focused Basic computer and documentation skills Responsibilities & Context About Kompass Education: Kompass Education is a leading and ethical overseas education consultancy. We support students in achieving their dreams of studying abroad by providing personalized guidance—from university selection to visa processing and pre-departure support. Position Overview: We are seeking a dedicated Post-Admission Executive to manage applications, secure admissions, and support students in the visa and travel process to European countries. Key Responsibilities: Application & Admission: Communicate with students to understand academic goals Apply to European universities and ensure timely submission of documents Follow up with universities and confirm offers/admissions Guide students in accepting offers and preparing financial documents Post-Admission Support: Assist students in preparing and submitting visa applications Coordinate with embassy/VFS offices and track visa progress Support with accommodation, travel bookings, and pre-departure arrangements Maintain clear communication and accurate documentation for all files Liaise with universities, embassy representatives, and internal teams Skills & Expertise Visa Processing Europe Visa Processing Education Counseling Education Research Education Suggested by Education Counseling Europe Visa Processing Immigration Education Consultancy Service Student Admission Visa Processing Compensation & Other Benefits Competitive salary. Opportunities for career growth. Employees with at least 2 years of service may be eligible for an L1A visa opportunity. What We Offer: A supportive and collaborative work environme
